subject: Sociology
title: Cultural Globalization
description: A micro-lesson that makes Cultural Globalization usable.

hook.text: A teenager in Tokyo wears Nike, listens to K-pop, and eats McDonald's. Whose culture is this?

buildup.text: Cultural globalization is the spread of ideas, values, and practices across borders through media, trade, and migration.

discovery.text: Western media dominates globally, spreading American and European cultural norms to every connected society.

twist.text: Globalization isn't one-way. Korean culture, Indian cinema, and African music now flow back to the West powerfully.

climax.text: Cultural globalization creates hybrid identities. People blend local and global influences in new, unpredictable ways.

punchline.text: Culture crosses every border we draw.

quiz.question: What is cultural globalization?
options: The spread of ideas, values, and practices across borders
